description: Comprehensive default-fast-excluded research workload inventory. Every test marked with research_kernel, research_e2e, audit_e2e, walk_forward_e2e, parallel_e2e, slow_research, nightly, or memory_sensitive must be listed here with budget and workload metadata. Duration values are conservative baseline assumptions used for ownership and ratchet review when exact local measurements are unavailable.

tests.reason: verifies dataset quality failures propagate through the real backtest report and promotion boundary
verifies real depth-walk fail-closed behavior at the production research boundary
verifies real depth-walk execution evidence through the production strategy/backtest path
verifies latency-adjusted top-of-book quote selection through the real kernel boundary
verifies missing quote fail policy at the real strategy/report boundary
verifies required top-of-book absence fails through the real dataset-quality and candidate-gate boundary
verifies deterministic content hash and quote coverage through repeated real production backtests
verifies strategy data requirements fail before production research execution proceeds
verifies real execution-timing stress policy behavior through the production evaluator

expected_workload.strategy_runs: single production backtest with stress timing policy

tests.reason: verifies real parallel worker initializer and process-boundary evidence
verifies real parallel failure artifact commit behavior at the main-process boundary
verifies real scenario aggregation and promotion refusal through production backtest output
verifies production-bound promotion acceptance over base and stress evidence in the dedicated research tier
verifies real resource-guard failure handling and candidate artifact persistence
guards memory resource fail-closed behavior through the real resource policy boundary
guards memory resource accounting semantics that are order-sensitive and excluded from default-fast validation
guards platform-specific RSS conversion behavior for memory policy without default-fast ordering sensitivity
verifies summary/full report metric gate equivalence on larger deterministic research outputs outside default-fast budget
verifies complete external audit JSONL persistence from a real production backtest

verifies real walk-forward window validation at the production entrypoint
